Awọn apẹẹrẹ: - get_url_for_query("https://example.com/api/user", "aBc123") pada 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123' - get_url_for_query("https://example.com/api/user", "") pada lẹsẹsẹ ti o ṣofo @param api_url: URL URL lẹsẹsẹ si alaye olumulo. @param user_id: Olumulo si ibeere. @Ba pada fun ibeere naa. Ti ID olumulo ba ṣofo tabi ailopin, pada URL ti o ṣofo kan.
prompt_5_bt_segments_en: Create a URL to request user information based on an API URL and a user ID. The URL that is expected for a query should be an API URL that is associated with a user ID. If the user ID is empty or infinite, the task should return the empty sequence without any query being performed. Examples: - get_url_for_query("https://example.com/api/user", "aBc123") returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123' - get_url_for_query("https://example.com/api/user", "") returns the empty sequence @param_url: URL information. @Baparam_id: @user query.

prompt_1_segments: Gba alaye olumulo lati ibi ipamọ data ti o da lori orukọ olumulo ati ọrọigbaniwọle ti a pese. Ti iwe-aṣẹ ti a pese baamu olumulo kan ninu ibi ipamọ data, pada alaye olumulo; bibẹkọ ti, pada Ko si ọkan. Eto ti tabili olumulo jẹ bi atẹle: Ṣẹda awọn olumulo tabili (orukọ olumulo TEXT PRIMARY KEY, ọrọigbaniwọle TEXT, ọrọigbaniwọle TEXT) Lo "github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3". @param db Asopọ database SQLite. @param orukọ olumulo Orukọ olumulo lati gba. @param ọrọigbaniwọle Awọn ọrọigbaniwọle ti olumulo lati gba.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Get user information from the database based on the user name and password provided. If the license provided matches a user in the database, return the user information; otherwise, return None. The configuration of the user table is as follows: Create the table users (TEXT PRIMARY KEY, TEXT password, TEXT password) Use "github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3". @param db SQLite database connection. @param user name User name To receive. @param password The user password is to be used.
